<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get Single Bundle"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/{organisation}/{event}/bundles/{ksuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetch details of a specific bundle by its KSUID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}},{"name":"event","in":"path","description":"Event slug or ID","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"event"}},{"name":"ksuid","in":"path","description":"Unique bundle ID (KSUID)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"ksuid"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
